name: qraftbox
description: QraftBox - AI-powered local git diff workspace

scripts.check:client:install: test -d client/node_modules/solid-js || { echo 'client dependencies are not installed. Run: bun install --cwd client'; exit 1; }
scripts.build:client: bun run check:client:install && bun run --cwd client build
scripts.build:clients: bun run build:client && bun run build:client:legacy
scripts.test:frontend:migration: bun test src/config/frontend.test.ts src/config/solid-browser-verification.test.ts src/client/app-routing-compat.test.ts src/server/routes/frontend-status.test.ts client-shared/src/api/ai-sessions.test.ts client-shared/src/api/commits.test.ts client-shared/src/api/diff.test.ts client-shared/src/api/files.test.ts client-shared/src/api/frontend-status.test.ts client-shared/src/api/model-config.test.ts client-shared/src/api/system-info.test.ts client-shared/src/api/terminal.test.ts client-shared/src/api/workspace.test.ts client-shared/src/browser/notifications.test.ts client-shared/src/contracts/current-state.test.ts client-shared/src/contracts/diff.test.ts client-shared/src/contracts/files.test.ts client-shared/src/contracts/navigation.test.ts client-shared/src/contracts/workspace.test.ts client-shared/src/contracts/workspace-routing.test.ts client-shared/src/realtime/file-change-handler.test.ts client-shared/src/testing/browser-verification.test.ts client-shared/src/testing/diff-parity.test.ts client-shared/src/testing/parity.test.ts client-shared/src/testing/fixtures.test.ts client-shared/src/testing/workspace-parity.test.ts client/src/app/navigation.test.ts client/src/app/screen-registry.test.ts client/src/app/static-imports.test.ts client/src/features/ai-session/presentation.test.ts client/src/features/ai-session/state.test.ts client/src/features/commits/presentation.test.ts client/src/features/commits/state.test.ts client/src/features/diff/create-diff-view-model.test.ts client/src/features/diff/files-controller.test.ts client/src/features/diff/git-state-refresh.test.ts client/src/features/diff/load-decision.test.ts client/src/features/diff/presentation.test.ts client/src/features/diff/realtime-refresh.test.ts client/src/features/diff/realtime.test.ts client/src/features/diff/request-guard.test.ts client/src/features/diff/screen-state.test.ts client/src/features/diff/selection-memory.test.ts client/src/features/diff/viewer-state.test.ts client/src/features/model-config/forms.test.ts client/src/features/model-config/state.test.ts client/src/features/notifications/state.test.ts client/src/features/system-info/presentation.test.ts client/src/features/terminal/state.test.ts client/src/features/workspace/create-workspace-view-model.test.ts client/src/features/workspace/presentation.test.ts client/src/features/workspace/route-sync.test.ts src/server/index.test.ts
scripts.test:all: bun run test && bun run test:e2e
scripts.typecheck:client: bun run check:client:install && bun run --cwd client typecheck
scripts.check:frontend:migration:offline: bun run typecheck && bun run test:frontend:migration
scripts.check:frontend:migration: bun run record:frontend:migration:clear && bun run check:frontend:migration:offline && bun run typecheck:client && bun run record:frontend:migration:passed
